scripts.sidecar:serve: node scripts/portable-run.mjs python -m uvicorn gongmu_sidecar.app:create_app --factory --app-dir services/sidecar/src --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765
scripts.desktop:bundle: npm run sidecar:bundle:windows && node scripts/sync-sidecar-bundle.mjs && node scripts/tauri-build-with-wix-fallback.mjs
scripts.desktop:bundle:debug: npm run sidecar:bundle:windows && node scripts/sync-sidecar-bundle.mjs && node scripts/tauri-build-with-wix-fallback.mjs --debug
scripts.sidecar:bundle:windows: node scripts/bundle-kordoc-runner.mjs && node scripts/portable-run.mjs python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean --distpath release/sidecar/windows-x64 --workpath runtime-workspace/cache/pyinstaller services/sidecar/packaging/gongmu-sidecar.spec
scripts.verify:all: npm run sidecar:test && npm run desktop:test && npm run desktop:build && node scripts/portable-run.mjs cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
